'''Halm''' was an arid [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], famous for its extensive mines. These mines contained rare [[Adegan crystal/Legends|Adegan crystals]], which were used in the construction of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]].

==History==
In [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Battle of Halm|attacked]] Halm during the [[Western Reaches Operation]], a military campaign that sought to destroy any [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|holdouts]]. Imperial [[Ace/Legends|Ace]] [[Shea Hublin]]'s fought in this battle.<ref name="TEGtW" />

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
{{Quote|Imperial troops have raided a mining operation on Halm. Why do they bother, I wonder, mmmm?|[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="YS" />}}
A [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony on Halm was raided by the Empire after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], but was rescued by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].<ref name="YS" />
{{Noncanonend}}

{{Planet-stub}}
